{ "name": "isexe", "version": "2.0.0", "description": "Minimal module to check if a file is executable.", "main": "index.js", "directories": { "test": "test" }, "devDependencies": { "mkdirp": "^0.5.1", "rimraf": "^2.5.0", "tap": "^10.3.0" }, "scripts": { "test": "tap test/*.js --100", "preversion": "npm test", "postversion": "npm publish", "postpublish": "git push origin --all; git push origin --tags" }, "author": "Isaac Z. Schlueter <i@izs.me> (http://blog.izs.me/)", "license": "ISC", "repository": { "type": "git", "url": "git+https://github.com/isaacs/isexe.git" }, "keywords": [], "bugs": { "url": "https://github.com/isaacs/isexe/issues" }, "homepage": "https://github.com/isaacs/isexe#readme" }
